# gamefabric_exportstore (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The unique object name.

### Read-Only

- `message` (String) A human-readable message with additional detail.
- `s3` (Attributes) S3-compatible storage configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--s3))
- `state` (String) The current operational state of the export store.
- `suspended` (Boolean) Whether audit log export is suspended.

<a id="nestedatt--s3"></a>
### Nested Schema for `s3`

Read-Only:

- `auth` (Attributes) Authentication configuration for the S3-compatible store. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--s3--auth))
- `bucket` (String) The bucket name.
- `endpoint` (String) The S3-compatible endpoint URL.
- `prefix` (String) An optional key prefix within the bucket.
- `region` (String) The storage region.

<a id="nestedatt--s3--auth"></a>
### Nested Schema for `s3.auth`

Read-Only:

- `access_key_id` (String) The access key ID.
- `secret_access_key` (String, Sensitive) The secret access key. Returned masked by the API.
